instructions.rationale: Writes the MOP configuration registers that program a macro-op program.
Executes an already-programmed macro-op; any embedded state effect activates during deferred execution rather than programming.
Records or replays a buffered instruction program.
Ordering-only DMA no-op; carries no persistent architectural state.
Pipeline stall/wait; ordering-only, no persistent state.
Blocks on a semaphore; ordering-only, changes no persistent state.
On Quasar SFPNOP clears source data-valid state (source-clear).
SFPU pipeline no-op on Wormhole/Blackhole; ordering-only.
No-op; ordering/latency padding only, no persistent state.
Programs persistent SFPU configuration registers.
Reviewed SFPU data-plane operations on LReg/dest contents; summarized as transient datapath. New SFP opcodes must be classified explicitly.
Src/Dst register data move; transient datapath contents.
Matrix-multiply datapath op writing Dst contents; transient.
Element-wise ALU datapath op writing Dst contents; transient.
Pooling datapath op writing Dst contents; transient.
SrcB register data manipulation; transient datapath contents.
Clears Dst/Src datapath contents; summarized as transient datapath.
Unpack NOP whose operands encode data-valid / source-clear state (WH/BH and Quasar).
Unpack data movement into Src registers; transient datapath contents.
Pack data movement out of Dst to L1; transient datapath contents.
Raw read-modify-write of a config register byte; persistent config state (includes Quasar RMWCIB3).
Reads configuration state into a datapath register and does not mutate persistent configuration.
Direct config-register write or read-modify-write; persistent config state.
Programs persistent Quasar tile/face/row index counters.
Programs persistent addressing/RWC counters.
Sets/clears/gates persistent data-valid or source-gate state.
Initializes/updates persistent semaphore state.
Acquires/releases a hardware mutex; persistent synchronization state.
Writes a persistent general-purpose (DMA) register.

mmio.rationale: MOP configuration MMIO array; programs a macro-op program.
Direct backend CONFIG register-file MMIO write; persistent config state.
Direct general-purpose register-file MMIO write; persistent GPR state.

helper_calls.name: mailbox_write
helper_calls.rationale: Publishes persistent cross-thread mailbox synchronization state.

helper_calls.name: mailbox_read
helper_calls.rationale: Consumes or observes persistent cross-thread mailbox synchronization state.

software_state.name: cfg_state_id
software_state.rationale: Shadow of the active config state id used to select later config context.

software_state.name: unp_cfg_context
software_state.rationale: Shadow of the active unpack config context.

software_state.name: dest_offset_id
software_state.rationale: Shadow of the active destination bank offset id.

software_state.name: dest_register_offset
software_state.rationale: Shadow of the destination register offset.

software_state.name: clear_dest_bank_id
software_state.rationale: Shadow of the destination bank id to clear.

software_state.name: pack_sync_tile_dst_ptr
software_state.rationale: Shadow of the packer sync tile destination pointer.

software_state.name: math_sync_tile_dst_index
software_state.rationale: Shadow of the math sync tile destination index.

software_state.name: data_format_config_set
software_state.rationale: Shadow tracking whether data-format config has been applied.

software_state.name: configured_num_tiles
software_state.rationale: Cached number of configured tiles that alters later LLK behavior.

software_state.name: num_tiles_per_sequence
software_state.rationale: Cached tiles-per-sequence count that alters later LLK behavior.

software_state.name: configured_zero_output
software_state.rationale: Cached zero-output configuration flag that alters later packing.

software_state.name: src_zero_flag_state
software_state.rationale: Persistent source zero-flag state shadow.

software_state.name: src_zero_flag_srca_fmt
software_state.rationale: Cached SrcA format for the source zero-flag shadow.

software_state.name: src_zero_flag_srcb_fmt
software_state.rationale: Cached SrcB format for the source zero-flag shadow.

software_state.name: topk_replay_init
software_state.rationale: Persistent TopK replay initialization cache that controls later replay rebuild behavior.

software_state.name: vConstFloatPrgm0
software_state.rationale: Programs persistent SFPU constant register 0 for subsequent data-plane operations.

software_state.name: vConstFloatPrgm1
software_state.rationale: Programs persistent SFPU constant register 1 for subsequent data-plane operations.

software_state.name: vConstFloatPrgm2
software_state.rationale: Programs persistent SFPU constant register 2 for subsequent data-plane operations.

software_state.name: vConstIntPrgm0
software_state.rationale: Programs persistent SFPU integer constant register 0 for subsequent data-plane operations.

software_state.name: vConstIntPrgm1
software_state.rationale: Programs persistent SFPU integer constant register 1 for subsequent data-plane operations.
